# SBDC Fort Bend and Southwest Harris local routing

Review date: 2026-06-28
Organization: UH Texas Gulf Coast SBDC Network
Local area: Fort Bend County and Southwest Harris County
Office or partner: Fort Bend County SBDC

## BOSS routing summary
Use when ZIP 77084 address verification suggests Fort Bend or Southwest Harris service route.

## Local service area
- Fort Bend advising page identifies Fort Bend and Southwest Harris County coverage.
- Broader Fort Bend page also references Fort Bend, Matagorda, and Wharton counties.
- ZIP 77084 requires exact address/county verification.

## Local services or resource types
- Confidential no-cost advising
- Business planning
- Market research
- Capital access
- Strategic planning
- Sales and marketing
- Financial analysis
- Government procurement and international trade routing

## Best-fit users
- Entrepreneurs in Fort Bend or Southwest Harris
- Users needing SBDC before APEX readiness
- Users needing capital access or market research

## BOSS intake questions
- What is your business ZIP code, county, and physical operating address?
- Are you operating from home, online, mobile, commercial space, or multiple locations?
- Are you looking for startup help, existing-business advising, funding readiness, contracts, permits, certifications, training, or mentoring?
- Is the business already legally formed and for-profit?

## Recommended next action
Verify exact business address and county. If Fort Bend or Southwest Harris fits, route to Fort Bend County SBDC advising; otherwise use Find Your SBDC.
